title: Executor (disambiguation)
content:
{{Otheruses|Executioner}}
[[File:Dark_Jedi_Executor_AoD_Mark_Evans.png|thumb|right|250px|A Dark Jedi Executor]]
'''Executor''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Executor-class Star Dreadnought|'''''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought''']], a class of [[Star Dreadnought]].
**'''''[[Executor]]''''', an ''Executor''-class Star [[Dreadnought]] that was [[Anakin Skywalker|Darth Vader's]] [[flagship]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|'''''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought''']], a class of [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought]].
**[[Executor/Legends|'''''Executor''''']], an ''Executor''-class Star [[Dreadnaught/Legends|Dreadnought]] that was [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]].
*[[Executor (Imperial rank)|'''Military Executor''']], the steward Commander-in-Chief of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]].
*[[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|'''Executor''']], a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] rank.
*[[Executor (Jedi Covenant)|'''Executor''']], a rank in the [[Jedi Covenant]].

{{Disambig}}

{{Interlang
|de=Exekutor (Begriffsklärung)
|es=Ejecutor (Desambiguación)
|tr=Vasi (belirsizlik)
}}
